problem id: 3d8e6b03
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(2) OR SHL(1)

examples:
  00011111 -> 01111110
  00011000 -> 01110000
  01111011 -> 11111111
  11011011 -> 11111111
  11100100 -> 11011011
  00101000 -> 11110000
  00011001 -> 01110110
  10000100 -> 00011010

query: 00011100
predicted answer: 01111000
